description: Monitors, analyzes, and responds to cyber threats in real-time.
notes: Maps to NICE work role: Defensive Cybersecurity

job_title: Red Team Operator (Associate) / Penetration Tester / Exp
description: Conducts penetration tests and participates in red team engagements under supervision. Focuses on executing defined tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) and documenting findings.

description: Leads complex penetration tests and red team engagements. Develops custom exploits, advanced TTPs, and innovative attack methodologies. Mentors junior operators.
notes: Offensive security specialization - custom position title

job_title: Red Team Lead / Offensive Cyber Operations Lead
description: Plans, scopes, and directs full-scope red team engagements and advanced adversary simulations. Manages the red team capabilities, methodologies, and reporting. Provides technical leadership.

job_title: Director of Offensive Security / Head of Red Team Operations
description: Establishes the vision, strategy, and budget for the organization offensive security program. Ensures alignment with enterprise risk and communicates program value to executive leadership.
notes: Offensive security specialization - custom position title

description: Supports vulnerability scanning and assessment tasks. Assists with documentation and tracking of vulnerabilities.
Performs vulnerability scans and analysis. Coordinates with system owners and engineers to remediate findings.
Oversees enterprise vulnerability management program. Prioritizes findings based on risk and ensures timely remediation.
Designs and optimizes enterprise vulnerability assessment architecture. Advises on advanced mitigation techniques.
Sets strategic direction for vulnerability risk reduction. Communicates program metrics and business impact to executive stakeholders.
Supports collection and preservation of digital evidence. Assists in basic forensic tasks under guidance.
Performs forensic imaging, evidence analysis, and reports findings to incident response or legal teams.

job_title: Senior Digital Forensics Specialist / Malware Analyst
description: Leads forensic investigations, reverse engineers malware, and provides deep analysis for advanced incidents.
notes: Senior technical specialist with malware analysis expertise

description: Oversees all forensic engagements, mentors junior analysts, and ensures process quality and integrity.

job_title: Director of Digital Forensics / Head of Incident Response
description: Leads the organizational strategy for forensic readiness, compliance, and high-profile investigations.
Performs basic compliance assessments and supports audits. Familiar with industry standards (e.g., NIST, ISO).
notes: Entry-level compliance and audit support role

description: Assesses risk, develops controls, and supports compliance initiatives. Conducts internal reviews and documentation.
Oversees organizational compliance and risk programs. Coordinates with departments and ensures adherence to policies.

job_title: Chief Risk Advisor / Senior Compliance Strategist
description: Leads enterprise risk assessment and mitigation strategies. Consults executive leadership and external stakeholders.
notes: Strategic advisory role for enterprise risk

job_title: Chief Risk Officer / VP of Governance & Compliance
description: Sets strategic direction for risk and compliance functions. Represents organization in regulatory and board-level matters.
Assists with assessing security controls and documenting compliance posture under supervision.
Supports system security engineering tasks and helps implement technical security measures.
Designs and implements secure systems, evaluates tools, and develops security solutions.
Performs detailed security analysis and provides recommendations for enhancing system defenses.
Develops high-level security architectures across systems and environments.
Leads enterprise-level architecture projects, integrates security into system designs.

job_title: Chief Security Architect / Director of Enterprise Security
description: Oversees all architectural and engineering functions, aligns with enterprise security strategy.
Focuses on developing applications with security in mind, understanding secure coding practices.

description: Designs enterprise-wide secure architecture strategies for applications; leads security reviews.

description: Oversees secure software initiatives and policy integration; manages teams and budget.

job_title: Cloud Security Analyst / Infrastructure Security Analyst
description: Performs security monitoring, assessments, and configuration validation across cloud and infrastructure platforms. Implements cloud policies.

job_title: Cloud Security Architect / Senior Cloud Security Engineer

job_title: Chief Cloud Security Officer / Director of Infrastructure Security
description: Owns enterprise-wide cloud and infrastructure security strategy. Oversees security posture across all cloud platforms and critical infrastructure.
Supports basic access control processes, user provisioning, and credential management under supervision.
Implements IAM systems and enforces identity governance policies. Manages lifecycle of user accounts and access rights.
Designs and manages scalable IAM infrastructure. Leads major IAM initiatives and ensures integration across systems.

job_title: Identity Services Architect / IAM Program Lead
description: Oversees architectural design of identity services. Manages enterprise-wide IAM policies and leads strategic IAM efforts.

job_title: Director of Identity & Access Management / Chief Identity Officer
description: Sets vision and direction for IAM across the organization. Aligns identity strategy with enterprise risk and compliance goals.

notes: Entry-level OT support with ICS/SCADA focus

description: Analyzes data and system configurations to detect vulnerabilities and threats in operational technology environments. Supports incident response efforts specific to OT.
Designs, configures, and maintains security controls for industrial control systems. Collaborates with engineering teams to ensure secure operations.
Develops architecture for secure ICS/SCADA systems and ensures alignment with organizational security standards and regulatory requirements.

job_title: Director of OT Cybersecurity / VP of Operational Security
description: Oversees the cybersecurity strategy for OT environments across the enterprise. Manages policy development, budgeting, compliance, and cross-departmental coordination.

description: Conducts detailed investigations of cybercrimes, including fraud, hacking, and digital theft.

description: Leads investigative efforts and complex digital forensic cases, providing oversight and mentoring.

Oversees enterprise-wide cybercrime investigation and forensic response strategy; liaises with executive stakeholders and external partners.
Supports basic cyber education and instruction efforts. Delivers prepared content to learners under supervision or as part of a team.
Develops and delivers technical cybersecurity training. Creates curriculum and adapts materials for diverse audiences and delivery methods.

job_title: VP of Cybersecurity Education & Workforce Development
description: Leads enterprise-wide cyber workforce development strategy, partnerships, and funding. Represents the organization in national education and workforce forums.

job_title: Cybersecurity Program Manager / Senior Information Security Officer
description: Oversees major components of the cybersecurity program, aligning it with enterprise risk. Coordinates with departments, manages projects, and ensures compliance with cybersecurity standards.

job_title: Deputy Chief Information Security Officer (Deputy CISO)
description: Serves as the CISO's senior technical and operational advisor. Helps execute the vision and strategy of the cybersecurity program and may lead internal committees or working groups.

Leads the entire cybersecurity program, defining vision, strategy, policies, and objectives. Communicates cybersecurity posture to executives and board members and ensures organization-wide alignment.
Supports project planning, status tracking, and documentation. Assists project leads with schedules and deliverables.
Manages individual cybersecurity projects with responsibility for scope, schedule, and cost. Coordinates technical teams.
Leads large or complex programs composed of multiple projects. Aligns program objectives with organizational goals.
Oversees multiple programs and ensures alignment with enterprise-wide cybersecurity strategy and resources.

job_title: Chief Program Officer / Executive Director of Cyber Programs
description: Sets strategic direction for major cybersecurity portfolios. Provides executive leadership, stakeholder engagement, and resource oversight.

job_title: Junior Security Tool Developer / Research Assistant
description: Assists in basic security tool coding, documentation, and lab work under supervision.
notes: Entry-level development and research support role

description: Develops cybersecurity tools, scripts, and utilities to improve threat detection or system security.

job_title: Senior Security Researcher / Security Engineer - Tooling
description: Designs and leads development of internal tools and automation for enterprise-scale security use cases.
Leads innovation efforts in tooling and new cybersecurity technologies. Engages with external research bodies.
Establishes vision and strategy for cyber R&D and internal tool development. Leads external partnerships and funding acquisition.
Supports development of automated detection and response workflows under supervision. Learns scripting and automation tools such as SOAR platforms.
Develops and maintains scripts and tools for automating security tasks. Works on SOAR integration and playbook implementation.
Leads orchestration of complex security processes across multiple systems. Focuses on performance, efficiency, and scalability.
Designs organization-wide automation strategies. Evaluates, architects, and integrates orchestration solutions at scale.
Establishes enterprise strategy for security automation and orchestration. Aligns efforts with business goals and risk posture.
Handles initial customer inquiries and support tickets related to cybersecurity products and services. Explains basic security practices to non-technical audiences.
Serves as the liaison between security solution providers and clients. Translates client needs into technical specifications and supports pre-sales discussions.
Designs and implements security solutions based on customer needs. Collaborates with engineering teams to tailor offerings.

job_title: Principal Security Advisor / Technical Account Manager
description: Leads strategic customer engagements and provides expert-level technical guidance on product implementations and integrations.

job_title: Chief Customer Security Officer / VP of Customer Security
description: Leads the customer security strategy across large accounts or client portfolios. Represents the organization's security vision to external stakeholders.
Assists in collecting and analyzing cyber threat information. Learns to interpret basic threat indicators and tools.
Performs cyber threat intelligence analysis to identify threats, TTPs, and adversary behavior using intelligence sources.
Develops threat profiles, strategic analysis, and attribution assessments. Interfaces with SOC, IR, and Red/Blue Teams.

job_title: Threat Intelligence Lead / Threat Hunter Lead
description: Oversees advanced threat modeling, hunting programs, and coordination with law enforcement or industry groups.
Leads the enterprise-wide threat intelligence strategy, manages teams, defines investment areas, and informs senior leadership.

description: Oversees compliance with privacy regulations and internal policies. Advises on policy changes and regulatory impacts. Works cross-functionally.

job_title: Chief Privacy Officer / Lead Policy Strategist
description: Leads enterprise-wide privacy programs and provides expert guidance on legal and regulatory issues. Shapes organizational privacy posture and strategic policy direction.

job_title: VP of Privacy & Legal Affairs / Chief Legal Counsel
